requirement_topic.en: Local Authorised Importer / Representative and Albanian Language Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 本地授权进口商/代表与阿尔巴尼亚语标注
requirement_topic.zht: 本地授權進口商/代表與阿爾巴尼亞語標注

summary.en: Foreign manufacturers placing radio equipment and telecom terminal equipment on the Albanian market must appoint a local authorised importer or representative established in Albania. The authorised importer is responsible for ensuring the product holds a valid AKEP type approval certificate and that the product labelling and user documentation are in Albanian. Product labels must include the importer's name, address, and contact information in Albanian. User manuals and safety instructions must be available in Albanian. This is a market-access requirement aligned with Albania's progressive adoption of EU regulatory practice under its accession candidacy. Albanian diaspora import flows (Italy, Greece, Germany) and Chinese logistics investment via Port of Durrës do not exempt products from AKEP and labelling requirements.
summary.zh: 将无线电设备和电信终端设备投放阿尔巴尼亚市场的境外制造商，须在阿尔巴尼亚指定一名当地授权进口商或代表。授权进口商负责确保产品持有有效的AKEP型式核准证书，并保证产品标签和用户文件使用阿尔巴尼亚语。产品标签须以阿尔巴尼亚语注明进口商的名称、地址和联系方式。用户手册和安全说明须提供阿尔巴尼亚语版本。这一市场准入要求与阿尔巴尼亚作为入盟候选国逐步采纳欧盟监管实践相一致。阿尔巴尼亚侨民进口渠道（意大利、希腊、德国）以及中国通过都拉斯港的物流投资，均不豁免产品的AKEP及标注要求。
summary.zht: 將無線電設備和電信終端設備投放阿爾巴尼亞市場的境外製造商，須在阿爾巴尼亞指定一名當地授權進口商或代表。授權進口商負責確保產品持有有效的AKEP型式核准證書，並保證產品標籤和用戶文件使用阿爾巴尼亞語。產品標籤須以阿爾巴尼亞語註明進口商的名稱、地址和聯繫方式。用戶手冊和安全說明須提供阿爾巴尼亞語版本。這一市場准入要求與阿爾巴尼亞作為入盟候選國逐步採納歐盟監管實踐相一致。阿爾巴尼亞僑民進口渠道（意大利、希臘、德國）以及中國通過都拉斯港的物流投資，均不豁免產品的AKEP及標注要求。

standards_or_laws: Law No. 9918/2008 on Electronic and Postal Communications (Albania) — importer obligations
AKEP type approval conditions — authorised importer / representative requirement
Albanian Consumer Protection Law — Albanian language labelling obligation
Law on Technical Requirements for Products and Conformity Assessment (Albania) — market surveillance and importer responsibilities

summary.en: China does not require a locally-established importer for foreign wireless devices in the same way; instead, MIIT type approval (SRRC / NAL) is obtained by the manufacturer or their agent directly. Chinese-market product labelling is in Chinese (Mandarin) and must comply with GB standards for labelling content. There is no direct Chinese equivalent to the Albanian authorised importer obligation.
summary.zh: 中国对境外无线设备不以同样方式要求在华设立本地进口商；MIIT型式核准（SRRC/NAL）由制造商或其代理直接申请。中国市场产品标注使用中文（普通话），须符合GB标准的标注内容要求。阿尔巴尼亚授权进口商义务在中国无直接对应项。
summary.zht: 中國對境外無線設備不以同樣方式要求在華設立本地進口商；MIIT型式核准（SRRC/NAL）由製造商或其代理直接申請。中國市場產品標注使用中文（普通話），須符合GB標準的標注內容要求。阿爾巴尼亞授權進口商義務在中國無直接對應項。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — applicant may be manufacturer or authorised agent (no mandatory local importer entity required)
GB 5296.1-2012 — Instructions for use of consumer products (Chinese language labelling)
GB 7247 / GB 10408 product label GB content requirements

gap.en: China has no equivalent local-importer mandate for the Albanian market. Manufacturers must establish or contract a legally-registered Albanian entity to act as authorised importer/representative before AKEP type approval can be activated for market placement. All product labelling and user documentation must be translated into Albanian. This is an additional compliance step with no analogue in the SRRC/NAL process. Chinese investment activity via Port of Durrës does not confer any regulatory exemption.
gap.zh: 中国针对阿尔巴尼亚市场没有等效的本地进口商强制要求。制造商须在AKEP型式核准可用于市场投放前，建立或签约一家在阿尔巴尼亚合法注册的实体作为授权进口商/代表。所有产品标签和用户文件须翻译成阿尔巴尼亚语。这是SRRC/NAL流程中没有对应项的额外合规步骤。中国通过都拉斯港的投资活动不赋予任何监管豁免。
gap.zht: 中國針對阿爾巴尼亞市場沒有等效的本地進口商強制要求。製造商須在AKEP型式核准可用於市場投放前，建立或簽約一家在阿爾巴尼亞合法註冊的實體作為授權進口商/代表。所有產品標籤和用戶文件須翻譯成阿爾巴尼亞語。這是SRRC/NAL流程中沒有對應項的額外合規步驟。中國通過都拉斯港的投資活動不賦予任何監管豁免。

source.publisher: AKEP — Autoriteti i Komunikimeve Elektronike dhe Postare (Electronic and Postal Communications Authority, Albania)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Appointment of a locally-registered Albanian authorised importer or representative and Albanian language labelling of product and user documentation are mandatory for market access in Albania. There is no Chinese-side equivalent. These requirements must be addressed before the product can be sold in Albania, regardless of AKEP type approval status. Verify specific importer registration and labelling obligations with a qualified Albanian legal or regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 指定在阿尔巴尼亚注册的授权进口商或代表，以及产品和用户文件的阿尔巴尼亚语标注，是进入阿尔巴尼亚市场的强制要求。中国方面无等效项。无论AKEP型式核准状态如何，产品在阿尔巴尼亚销售前须满足这些要求。请向合格的阿尔巴尼亚法律或监管专业人士核实具体的进口商注册和标注义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 指定在阿爾巴尼亞注冊的授權進口商或代表，以及產品和用戶文件的阿爾巴尼亞語標注，是進入阿爾巴尼亞市場的強制要求。中國方面無等效項。無論AKEP型式核准狀態如何，產品在阿爾巴尼亞銷售前須滿足這些要求。請向合格的阿爾巴尼亞法律或監管專業人士核實具體的進口商注冊和標注義務。
